c74object.name: tap.buffer.snap~
c74object.digest: Snap a time to the nearest zero-crossing location in a buffer
c74object.description: Snap a time to the nearest zero-crossing location in a buffer.

objarg.name: name
objarg.digest: Name of the buffer to reference
objarg.description: Name of the buffer to reference.

method.name: float
method.digest: A location in the buffer to be quantized to the nearest zero-crossing
method.description: A location in the buffer to be quantized to the nearest zero-crossing.

method.name: set
method.digest: Choose a named buffer~ from which to read
method.description: Choose a named buffer~ from which to read.
